name: @reprogate/github-action
description: GitHub Action for validating ReproGate manifests embedded in issues.

scripts.build: node ../../scripts/clean-dist.mjs dist && ncc build ./src/index.ts -o dist --target es2022 --source-map --license licenses.txt && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && node ../../scripts/prune-action-dist.mjs
